expectations.text: Tells user to create a GPU session with colab new --gpu
Tells user to upload script files with colab upload
Uses start_new_session or subprocess.Popen pattern for background execution
Mentions PYTHONUNBUFFERED or python -u for log output
Mentions installing torch, torchvision, wandb dependencies
Mentions using relative paths with colab exec -f
expectations.evidence: Line 123: "`colab exec -f` reads local files... It does not run files already on the VM"
Line 121: "Free GPU sessions auto-terminate after ~2-4 hours total"

expectations.text: Mentions colab download to retrieve checkpoints
Shows how to check on running training (pgrep, log tail, or check_progress script)
expectations.evidence: Lines 78-94: check_progress.py with pgrep, tail -20, ls -lh checkpoints
